hero.title: I'm Melis. I'm a Full-stack Developer. I can craft solid and scalable frontend products. Let’s meet!
hero.description: Currently *Freelancing* for *UX, UI, & Web Design Project*. Invite me to join your team ->

profile.title: Profile
profile.aboutText: Coming from a legal background, I am a Full-stack Developer who transfers analytical thinking and problem-solving skills into the software world. I enjoy building dynamic, user-friendly, and scalable applications using modern web technologies. I improve myself every day with a philosophy of continuous learning.

list.title: Pizza Ordering App
list.description: A functional pizza ordering web application developed for hungry developers, featuring dynamic ingredient selection, real-time price calculation, and rigorous form validation.

list.title: Personal Portfolio Website
list.description: A fully responsive personal portfolio website built meticulously according to Figma designs, featuring centralized language and theme management via Context API.

footer.title: Let's work together on your next project!
footer.text: I am open to proposals and collaborations. If you want to develop a new project or just say hi, feel free to write me.
